case_title: DHARMESH B PATEL VS. RODNEY WEAVER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DHARMESH B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEAVER, RODNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 9/23/09, $2,050.00 RENT, $405.00 COSTS, $621.47 HOLDOVER DAMAGES,, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,076.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WEAVER, RODNEY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT WEAVER, RODNEY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DHARMESH B AS TO DEFENDANT WEAVER, RODNEY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DHARMESH B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEAVER, RODNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3161 16TH STREET, #501, S.F. CA. 94103-3334, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
